description: CUDA out-of-memory during model training after batch size increase

ground_truth.root_cause: Batch size was increased from 8 to 64 in trainer.py without corresponding memory budget analysis, causing GPU OOM during the _load_batch forward pass on a 14 GiB allocation attempt.
ground_truth.recommended_fix: Revert BATCH_SIZE to 8 or implement gradient accumulation (e.g. accumulation_steps=8) to simulate larger effective batch sizes without exceeding VRAM.
